   **Bugs and stability.**

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Steve Zywica_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "update: weeks later and a new device. kyc is still broken and keeps making me redo. this app is a joke update: I literally just did it 10 times and it still fails. screw this app. update: this stupid new kyc system is trash. it keeps denying me for not having a neutral facial expression despite my 1000% neutral facial expression. this used to be the best on ramp for crypto and now it's insane how much of a joke this app turned into."
